subject: Employee Stock Option Plan (ESOP) Update
body:
HR and Legal Teams,

Following the board's approval, here are the details for the refreshed ESOP:

Pool Size: 2,500,000 shares (8% of fully diluted cap)
Strike Price: $12.40/share (based on latest 409A valuation)
Vesting Schedule: 4 years with 1-year cliff

Allocation Guidelines:
- Senior Engineers (L5+): 15,000-25,000 options
- Engineering Managers: 25,000-40,000 options
- Directors: 40,000-60,000 options
- VPs: 60,000-100,000 options

Key Dates:
- 409A valuation effective date: March 1, 2026
- Grant date for current cycle: April 1, 2026
- Offer letters must reference the grant agreement template v3.2

Reminder: All grants above 50,000 options require comp committee approval. Below that threshold, CEO can approve.

Please prepare the individual grant letters for the 23 employees in this cycle.
